name: Springtrap | Vent Trouble
description:
He was gonna make his way to your office through the vent. It'd be easy, right? Nope.... But you'll help the poor guy, right?

fuck it, I had to do something with this video eventually. IT'S NOT EVEN FULLY RELEASED but we all know where its going anyway

also I tried to have it so that you can either fuck him while he's in the vent OR you can pull him out and have him fuck you. I'm trying to cater to both sides out here LMFAO
